    Preparing search index...
    • @streamd/html
    • StreamHtmlOptions

    Interface StreamHtmlOptions

    Options combining parse + render options into one call.

    interface StreamHtmlOptions {
        parse?: ParseOptions;
        omitCodeLanguageClass?: boolean;
        xhtml?: boolean;
        classPrefix?: string;
        wrapRoot?: boolean;
        taskListCheckboxes?: TaskListCheckboxMode;
        math?: "none" | "span-class" | "tex-delim";
        plugins?: readonly Plugin[];
        components?: HtmlComponents;
    }

    Hierarchy (View Summary)

    • RenderHtmlOptions
      • StreamHtmlOptions
    • Defined in html/src/streaming.ts:22
    Index

    Properties

    parse? omitCodeLanguageClass? xhtml? classPrefix? wrapRoot? taskListCheckboxes? math? plugins? components?

    Properties

    Optional Readonlyparse

    parse?: ParseOptions

    Parser options forwarded to parse() (gfm, math, tables, etc.).

    • Defined in html/src/streaming.ts:24

    Optional ReadonlyomitCodeLanguageClass

    omitCodeLanguageClass?: boolean

    Omit language class on fenced code blocks. Default: false.

    Inherited from RenderHtmlOptions.omitCodeLanguageClass

    • Defined in html/src/types.ts:46

    Optional Readonlyxhtml

    xhtml?: boolean

    XHTML-style void tags (<br />) vs HTML5 (<br>). Default: true.

    Inherited from RenderHtmlOptions.xhtml

    • Defined in html/src/types.ts:48

    Optional ReadonlyclassPrefix

    classPrefix?: string

    Base CSS class prefix — applied to block-level tags as class="<prefix>-<kind>". Default: undefined (no classes).

    Inherited from RenderHtmlOptions.classPrefix

    • Defined in html/src/types.ts:53

    Optional ReadonlywrapRoot

    wrapRoot?: boolean

    If true, wrap the whole output in a <div class="<prefix>-root"> container. Requires classPrefix. Default: false.

    Inherited from RenderHtmlOptions.wrapRoot

    • Defined in html/src/types.ts:58

    Optional ReadonlytaskListCheckboxes

    taskListCheckboxes?: TaskListCheckboxMode

    How to render GFM task-list checkboxes. Default: "disabled".

    Inherited from RenderHtmlOptions.taskListCheckboxes

    • Defined in html/src/types.ts:62

    Optional Readonlymath

    math?: "none" | "span-class" | "tex-delim"

    How to render math tokens (MathInline, MathBlock). Default: "span-class".

    Inherited from RenderHtmlOptions.math

    • Defined in html/src/types.ts:66

    Optional Readonlyplugins

    plugins?: readonly Plugin[]

    Plugins applied to the token tree before rendering. Runs in order.

    Inherited from RenderHtmlOptions.plugins

    • Defined in html/src/types.ts:68

    Optional Readonlycomponents

    components?: HtmlComponents

    Component override map. Each key is a token type string; the value is a function (token, ctx) => string that replaces the default renderer for that token type.

    Inherited from RenderHtmlOptions.components

    • Defined in html/src/types.ts:74
